# fixture-model (conformant)

A conformant per-model fixture repo used to exercise `check_conformance`.
It satisfies every item of the conformance checklist.

## Install

```bash
pip install -e .
```

Requires the `omnidocbench-rocm` engine package.

## Demo

See `examples/run_demo.sh` for a one-command smoke run.

## Evaluation

```bash
omnidocbench-rocm infer --adapter adapter/run_adapter.py --platform linux-rocm
```

Eval config lives at `eval/configs/omnidocbench_v16.yaml`.

## Reproducibility

Results under `results/omnidocbench/v16/linux-rocm/` are reproducible from the
committed adapter + config on the declared hardware. Provenance and run_summary
artifacts are generated by the engine and validated against the schema.

## Known Gaps

- This is a fixture: the adapter emits placeholder text, not real OCR output.
- No Windows/HIP results are committed yet.
